arts.ttl: PSG’s Luis Enrique Makes Bold Call for Liverpool Match, Big Signing Left on Bench
arts.sum: Liverpool have been in great form this season but had the weekend off, so they’ll enter their first-leg Champions League match against Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes either well-rested or potentially a bit rusty. Before shifting their focus to Europe, Liverpool secured a 2-0 win over Newcastle United at Anfield on Wednesday, carrying […] The post PSG’s Luis Enrique Makes Bold Call for Liverpool Match, Big Signing Left on Bench appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury news: Attacker misses training ahead of Paris Saint-Germain Champions League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Wednesday, but boss Arne Slot may be without one of his key stars due to injury.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich given Liverpool transfer verdict amid Bayern Munich exit talk
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is out of contract in the summer and has been linked with a move to Liverpool and Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arne Slot has different version of events to Michael Oliver in X-rated Liverpool row
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot unleashed a foul-mouthed rant towards referee Michael Oliver after last month's Merseyside derby, but the pair have different accounts of what was said

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah explains what he's been doing differently during remarkable Liverpool season
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah says Premier League glory will mean more than another Champions League as he reveals surprise key to his stunning campaign under Arne Slot

arts.ttl: How Ousmane Dembele became the poster boy of a new-look PSG - the ex-Barcelona winger is thriving in a new role to lead Europe's scoring charts this year, writes LEWIS STEELE
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: In 2025 alone, he has 18 goals - more than anyone in Europe's top five leagues by some stretch. Even scoring machine Mohamed Salah has only - 'only' said in jest - hit 10.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Liverpool manager's explicit referee rant in Merseyside derby revealed
arts.sum: Arne Slot warned referee Michael Oliver he would be to blame if Liverpool are not crowned Premier League champions in an explicit rant which saw him sent off after last month's Merseyside derby, the official match report has revealed. Oliver had not yet produced a red card but, after Slot allegedly turned to the assistant referee and described the result as a "f**king disgrace", the decision was made to dismiss the Liverpool manager.
